titleStmt.title: SII 16.154: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 154. (A.R. No. 419 of 1915.) GURIJAVŌLU, NARASAROWPET TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in a street.
This is dated Śaka 1468, Parābhava, Śrāvaṇa ba. 12, Thursday, corresponding to 1546 A.D., August 23, which was Monday.

It registers a grant of the village Goraṁjavrōlu in Koṇḍavīṭi-sīma as agrahārato Tāḷḷapāka Tiruveṅgaḷanāthayya, son of Tirumalayya of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra and Ṛik-śākha. The gift is said to have been made before the god Tiruveṅgaḷanātha on the bank of Svāmipushkariṇi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmānujā
yanamaḥ . svastiśrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbu
lu 1468 Agunēṁṭi parābhava saṁvatsara
śrāvaṇa ba 12 gu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāvi śrīvīra sadāśivadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagaramaṁddu ratnasiṁhvāsanā
sīnuṁḍai pṛthvīsāmrājyamusēyucunu bhāradvā
jagōtra Āśvalāyanasūtra ·ṛkśākhādhyāyulai
na śrīmadvēdamārgapratiṣṭhāpanācāryulaina tāḷlapāka ti
rumalayyaṁgāri kumāruṁḍu tiruveṁgaḷanātha
yyaṁgāriki daṁḍḍamu samarpiṁcci yiccina dharmaśā
sana kramameṭlannanu . koṁḍḍavīṭisīmalōni goraṁ
javrōligrāmamu mīku svāmipuṣkariṇī
tīramaṁddu tiruveṁggaḷanāthuni sannidhini sa
hiraṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakamugānu
sarvamānya Agrahāramugānu dhāravōśi

trivācakamugānu yistimigāna
galigina Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyālunnu dāna
vikraya yōgyaṁgānu
Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁpaṁga
lavāramani yiccina Agrahāramu . dānapā
lanayōrmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ .
dānātsvargga mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
padaṁ . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
